note.en: It is **recommended** to build some [[stat:cr]] in substats to have a higher chance of triggering the bow passive for energy.
Preferred over **[[weapon:favonius-warbow]]** at higher refinements **(R3+)** when batterying another [[element:cryo]] character.
One of the best choice for stronger shields, however the [[stat:er]] and useful passives of other weapons will generally make it a suboptimal pick.
